title: carex microglochin var. oligantha
intro: Carex microglochin var. oligantha, also known as a type of sedge, is a perennial plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with the roots and rhizomes being used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and respiratory infections. The health benefits of Carex microglochin var. oligantha include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe sore throats and relieve coughs. Carex microglochin var. oligantha can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, where the dried roots and rhizomes are steeped in hot water to make a medicinal tea.
